quote: Love never left us—we just grew dim for a while, shadowed by fear, anger, and exhaustion.
author: Rev. Randy Lewis
socialPost:
In moments of darkness, we often forget that love is our guiding light. As we navigate through fear and exhaustion, let us remember that healing and hope are ever-present, waiting for us to embrace them anew. Together, we can rise, resilient and united in love.
https://blog.revrandylewis.com/bad-moon-rising

#Healing #Hope #Resilience #Love #Humanity

quote: ‘Unbroken’ doesn’t mean untouched. It means the breaking stopped with us.
author: Rev. Randy Lewis
socialPost:
Healing is not about being untouched; it’s about recognizing our scars and choosing to stop the cycle of pain. Together, we can build a legacy of resilience and strength for future generations.
https://blog.revrandylewis.com/unbroken

#Healing #Resilience #Family #Legacy

quote: Give us the courage and fortitude to do what is in our power to do. May we work toward the greater good, being always mindful of how our actions, or inaction, affect others.
author: Rev. Randy Lewis
socialPost:
In times of uncertainty and strife, we must summon the courage to act toward the greater good. Each of us holds the power to influence our communities positively, and it’s vital to recognize how our choices impact others. Let us embody compassion and justice in our daily lives, honoring those affected by violence and working tirelessly for a brighter future.

Read more: https://blog.revrandylewis.com/prayer-at-the-vigil-for-victims-of-gun-violence

#Community #Compassion #Courage #Justice
